authoritative_source.note: Labelled competition CSVs with WELL and FORCE_2020_LITHOFACIES_LITHOLOGY. No robots restriction.

las_mirror.note: LAS-format mirror plus NPD spreadsheets. Zenodo robots.txt blocks automated fetch of file endpoints; opt-in via --with-las which disables robots for this direct DOI download. Not needed for the benchmark.

dataset_breakdown: 118 wells total in the public release = 98 training + 10 open leaderboard test + 10 blind final test
notes: The public FORCE 2020 release is 118 wells total: 98 training + 10 open leaderboard test + 10 blind final test. Verified 2026-07-04: train.csv has 98 unique wells; leaderboard_test_features.csv (open) has 10; hidden_test.csv (blind final) has 10.
The starter notebook mentions 83 wells (stale demo figure) and a team folder (code/GIR/train.csv) holds a 28-well subset; neither is the official set.
